title: 今日俾CNN 記者訪問，佢問我：「仲有咩系香港人想俾全世界嘅人知」

replies.msg:
今日行街
接受咗 CNN 記者 Josh Berliner 訪問
一開始都係問啲大路問題
到最後佢問話
有冇啲乜野關於國安法或者今年七一嘅嘢係你覺得需要俾世界各地嘅人知嘅
我嗰一剎那嗰腦系空白咗
於是佢俾咗卡片我
話如果諗到的話可以聯絡佢

不如俾大家一齊諗
一人一句講低自己心聲
無論係悲憤嘅情緒定無助嘅吶喊都好
等我集合咗大家嘅留言之後send俾佢
等有人同我哋做見證。
CNN
香港腳唔關我地事！
Be aware or Be next

外國講任何仇中國言論一律當犯法，包括武肺、港獨、警暴

都係提醒佢地唔好信中共 stand with us 我地有一息尚存都為香港而戰

想世界都記住香港人的勇敢
系你老母
核平中國
You are fake news

injustice anywhere is a threat to justice everywhere

五十年不變都係假嘅承諾
look at what happened to XinJiang and Hong Kong will be next

香港係我地既家，我地愛香港人香港地。就算極權政府立國安法都好，都唔能夠迫使人去愛呢個国。你可以限制我既身驅，但你殺唔死我腦裡面既思想！民族自強！香港獨立！

照抄美隊2劇本：

Attention, all free world citizens. This is Steve Rogers. I think it's time you know the truth. Hong Kong is not what we thought it was, it's been taken over by CCP. 維尼 is their leader. The police and 公務員 crew are CCP as well. I don't know how many more, but I know they're in the world. They could be standing right next to you. They almost have what they want: absolute control. They shot protectors and it won't end there. If you keep tolerate and ignore situation in Hong Kong, CCP will be able to kill anyone that stands in their way, unless we stop them. I know I'm asking a lot, but the price of freedom is high, it always has been, and it's a price I'm willing to pay. And if I'm the only one, then so be it. But I'm willing to bet I'm not.

replies.msg: The World needs to know that China is promoting another mode of governance with unchecked, omnipotent power of one single political party, not just within China but to terrtories under China's influence. Many precious values strived by Humanity with blood and tears like freedom of speech, freedom of religious beliefs, respect of human rights, protection of civil lives and rights, lives without fear from secret police and dictatorship, rule of law ,etc are lost within China-controlled territories. Many more to come, many more countries under threats with growing power of China. Thousands and millions of martyrs sarcificed for Magna Carta, Renaissance, the French Revolution, the American Revolution, WWI, the Cold War and many others to mention. We inherited their merits and now it is our time and duty to uphold these values and pass these to our next generations. China is strong and getting stronger every single day. Either we restrain China now or wait until we can't. Tomorrow is our choices, to appease darkness or to shed light. History remembers. Hope everyone would be proud of their choices when facing our sons and daughters and theirs in the future and afterworld.

可以歸納以下幾個重點：

1. Reinforced the illegality of the national security law and how it violate human rights and demolish the judicial independence system as well as the power of the Legco

2. Regarding to the situation of hk, which has proved that any promises, contracts made by the CCP are absolutely untrustful, we should convince the west that no more compromises shall made.

3. HKers will keep protesting and fighting with the brutal, barbaric regime and never surrender. But thousands of lives of HKers are at risk as we are under the threat of political persecution and tortures. We desperately hope the civilised world could give a helping hand to shelter TRUE HKers.

4. The HK immigrants are not going to be parasites of the civilised countries but would become a great contribution to their own economy

5. HKers has lost almost everything, this is our final SOS call to the world.

how about these 3 messages:
1) we love hk so much that we, despite the risk of getting arrested and being sent to jail, have taken to the street again and again.

2) the passage of the national security law has marked the end of "one country, two systems", and the freedoms that hk people have enjoyed are being taken away. it's no longer the "hong kong" that we love and are proud of.

3) we need countries around the world to stand with us Hongkongers. impose any necessary sanctions on the CCP regime and the Chinese and hk officials. help us bring back the Hong Kong we used to know.
抵制國貨！
我哋真係好撚鍾意香港
推

香港站在民主自由的歷史橋頭堡

世界已在1989年錯過了一次機會
今天自由世界如何選擇是關鍵。
香港獨立 唯一出路
97後都希望有人記得有人拯救

由其alibaba tencent 小米華為呢啲國企
我地無可能請人出兵
要打持久戰，慢慢削弱中共既經濟力量

1997+50≠2020.
We’re NOT giving up.
China is the next Nazi

大體D來講??

CCP is definitely a threat to the world, but the majority of Americans aren't aware of that. CCP builds concentration camps, wipes out religion, and promotes ethnic cleansing. With the West appeasement and the kowtow to RMB, it becomes the world's largest, most powerful criminal organization and it is no less evil than the Nazis. The CCP is spreading the virus causing millions of infections and hundreds of thousands of deaths. The numbers are still going up. While the world is occupied by the virus, CCP passed this national security law. Our lives are being destroyed. The truth is suppressed. What we, the Hong Konger, are facing now would be what you are facing tomorrow. We urge the world to stand up and fight with us. This is the fight between evil and good, tyranny and democracy, desperate and hope. God Bless.

quote.msg:
今日行街
接受咗 CNN 記者 Josh Berliner 訪問
一開始都係問啲大路問題
到最後佢問話
有冇啲乜野關於國安法或者今年七一嘅嘢係你覺得需要俾世界各地嘅人知嘅
我嗰一剎那嗰腦系空白咗
於是佢俾咗卡片我
話如果諗到的話可以聯絡佢

不如俾大家一齊諗
一人一句講低自己心聲
無論係悲憤嘅情緒定無助嘅吶喊都好
等我集合咗大家嘅留言之後send俾佢
等有人同我哋做見證。

the god was doing something out of our logic.
we should stand with him and hong kong .
To Destroy Evil CCP

1. Never trust CCP.

2. NSL controls everything and everyone (see article 38) - freedom of speech, media, education, data security and privacy...it’s a declaration of war.

3. Sanction, more, please!

4. We HKers are ready, liberty or death.
簡而精！！！
